pages.text: The $(l)Ritual Altar$() is the heart of the ritual system. Through it you can ascend to higher stages of power, craft rare items, receive combat blessings, and even tear open a gate to the boss arena.

$(l)Building the Structure$()$(br2)The altar requires a $(#fa0)cross-shaped layout$() of 5 blocks:$(br2)1. Place the $(l)Ritual Altar$() at the center.$(br)2. Place 4 $(l)Ritual Pedestals$() at the cardinal directions, each $(#5cf)exactly 2 blocks away$() from the altar.$(br2)$(l)Layout (top view):$()$(br)$(#888)  .  .  P  .  .$()$(br)$(#888)  .  .  .  .  .$()$(br)$(#888)  P  .  A  .  P$()$(br)$(#888)  .  .  .  .  .$()$(br)$(#888)  .  .  P  .  .$()$(br)$(br)A = Altar, P = Pedestal

$(l)Using the Pedestals$()$(br2)$(#5cf)Right-click$() a pedestal while holding an item to place it. Right-click an empty hand to retrieve. Items are consumed upon successful ritual completion.$(br2)$(l)Important:$() All 4 pedestals must be placed and loaded with the correct ingredients — order does not matter.

$(l)Performing a Ritual$()$(br2)$(#0f0)Step 1:$() Build the altar structure (altar + 4 pedestals).$(br)$(#0f0)Step 2:$() Place the required ingredients on the 4 pedestals.$(br)$(#0f0)Step 3:$() $(#fa0)Right-click the Altar$() to activate.$(br2)If the ingredients match a known ritual, it will execute immediately. On success, all pedestal items are consumed and a particle burst appears.$(br2)$(#f55)Common errors:$()$(br)- "Structure incomplete" — a pedestal is missing or misplaced$(br)- "No match" — wrong ingredients or combination$(br)- "Not ready" — prerequisites not met (ascension rituals)
